title: ACE Pump Precision Where Every Drop Matters.

title: We assist in compiling, guiding, and completing FDA Form 3602N to help eligible businesses obtain Small Business Determination.
paras: We at @revivemedicaltechnologies have been successful in obtaining an @fda Small Business Fee Waiver approval for our client’s 510(k) Cranial Implant submission. This reduced their FDA 510(k) user fee from $26,067 to just $6,517.
We assist in compiling, guiding, and completing FDA Form 3602N to help eligible businesses obtain Small Business Determination.
CDRH's Small Business Determination Program qualifies eligible businesses for reduced FDA user fees based on their annual gross sales or receipts.
Benefits include:
• Reduced Application Fee: Businesses (including affiliates) with gross sales or receipts of $100 million or less may qualify for reduced fees on eligible CDRH submissions.

• First Premarket Application/Report Fee Waiver: Businesses with gross sales or receipts of $30 million or less, including affiliates, may qualify for a waiver if neither they nor their affiliates have previously received this benefit.

• Registration Fee Waiver: Businesses with gross sales or receipts of $1 million or less may qualify for a registration fee waiver if they have previously paid the registration fee and can demonstrate financial hardship, subject to FDA eligibility requirements.

At Revive Medical Technologies, we provide end-to-end regulatory support to help medical device companies successfully navigate the FDA Small Business Determination process and reduce regulatory costs.

#ReviveMedicalTechnologies #FDA #FDA510k #medicaldevicesdevelopment #regulatoryaffairs #medicaldeviceregulations #cdrh #smallbusinessuk #FDAcompliance #medicaltechnology #HealthcareInnovation #regulatoryconsulting #qualityassurance #medicaldeviceindustry #innovations

title: * Why critical-sized bone defects are so difficult to treat
paras: For decades, these injuries often meant multiple surgeries, long recovery times, and uncertain outcomes.Today, biomaterial science is changing that.3D-printed scaffolds are designed to do something remarkable—not replace bone permanently, but create a temporary framework that guides the body to regenerate its own tissue. As new bone forms, many scaffolds gradually degrade, leaving behind living tissue instead of permanent implants.It's a powerful example of how engineering and biology are beginning to work together rather than independently.In this carousel, we explore:
* Why critical-sized bone defects are so difficult to treat
* How biomaterial scaffolds support natural regeneration
* The science behind scaffold design and performance

* Why testing, manufacturing, and regulatory strategy matter before these technologies reach patients If you're working on the next breakthrough in biomaterials, Revive Medical Technologies Inc. can support you at every stage of the journey—from scaffold fabrication and material characterization to contract manufacturing and regulatory guidance. Whether you're a researcher, startup, or medical device company, we help turn innovative concepts into solutions that are ready for validation, scale, and clinical translation.
Science creates possibilities. Revive Medical Technologies Inc. helps bring them closer to patients.
Website: https://rmt-usa.com/

Swipe through to discover how regenerative medicine is reshaping the future of bone healing.#ReviveMedicalTechnologies #biomaterials #tissueengineering #3dprinting #regenerativemedicine #biomedicalengineering #medicaldevices #boneregeneration #MedicalInnovation

Revolutionize your laboratory testing with the advanced Bath Shaker by Revive Medical Technologies.Engineered for consistency, this precision-controlled system delivers uniform temperature distribution along with consistent agitation, making it ideal for a wide range of lab applications. Featuring adjustable shaking speed, digital interface, corrosion-resistant chamber, and multiple safety protections, it ensures stable, low-noise, and reliable performance every time. Precision, agitation, and performance all in one powerful equipment.

See clearly. Act early. The Vision Awareness Device (VAD) by Revive Medical Technologies is redefining how communities approach eye health making vision screening simple, accessible, and part of everyday life. Designed for effortless self-assessment, this passive and low-cost solution empowers individuals to detect potential vision issues early, without the need for clinical setup or supervision. From schools to workplaces and public spaces, VAD is more than a device it’s a step toward building a culture of proactive care, where awareness leads to timely action and healthier futures.

A robust Product Development Lifecycle is essential for ensuring safety, performance, and regulatory compliance in medical devices.At Revive Medical Technologies Inc. our approach integrates structured planning, rigorous design validation, and continuous improvement aligned with global industry standards such as ISO 13485. From early-stage ideation and risk assessment to prototyping, testing, and commercialization, each phase is carefully managed to ensure both quality and reliability.By combining engineering excellence with a strong quality-first mindset, we ensure that every product not only meets regulatory requirements but also delivers real clinical value.Turning concepts into clinically reliable solutions step by step.#medicaldevice #ISO13485 #QualityManagement #medtech

title: Key Highlights:
paras: Introducing the SCTTM – the next-generation Specialised Catheter Trackability Testing Machine from Revive Medical Technologies Inc.Engineered for unrivaled precision and real-world procedure emulation, this cutting-edge system delivers exceptional performance for testing intracranial, cardiovascular catheters and beyond.
Key Highlights:
- Unrivaled Precision: Measures force with ±10mN accuracy (pinpointing force on each curve with curve dynamics)
- Procedure Emulation: Replicates real-world stroke movement length and movement
- Programmable stroke length for flexible, customizable testing
- Analytical Power: Saves & analyzes test data with powerful insights
- Universal Compatibility: Works with intracranial, cardiovascular catheters & more applications
- Enhanced Control: Custom temperature-controlled environment
- Interchangeable: Modular testing rigs for seamless adaptability
- Seamless Tracking: Smooth catheter trackability testing with seamless catheter tracking

Elevate your medical device testing with this advanced, temperature-controlled, interchangeable-rig system that offers unparalleled accuracy and control.Designed to emulate real-world conditions and provide detailed force dynamics analysis – the future of catheter trackability testing is here!Contact us today: info@rmt-usa.com | www.rmt-usa.com

title: With this successful achievement, we now have the capacity to provide microspheres optimized for your intended applications, including:
paras: We are proud to announce that we have successfully completed the R&D of high-quality microspheres (an intravascular device) for vascular embolization application for our U.S.-based client and are now handling its US-FDA approval and offering them full-scale contract manufacturing at our both onshore and offshore production facilities. This milestone reflects our ability to translate complex innovation into reliable, scalable medical solutions.

Our capabilities are reinforced by our DRAP manufacturing license and ISO 13485–certified design and manufacturing scope for intravascular medical devices (microspheres), ensuring the highest standards of quality, safety, and regulatory compliance.
With this successful achievement, we now have the capacity to provide microspheres optimized for your intended applications, including:
-Embolization therapies
-Targeted drug delivery
-Controlled-release pharmaceutical formulations
-Interventional radiology and oncology procedures
Leveraging these capabilities, Revive Medical Technologies Inc. can offer:
-Custom microspheres tailored to your application
-Nanoparticles for advanced therapeutic delivery
-Polymer-based scaffolds for regenerative medicine applications
-R&D services to develop your intended formulations
-Contract manufacturing, delivering scalable, regulatory-compliant production
From innovation to commercialization, we are committed to delivering precision-engineered, high-quality medical products that meet the evolving needs of advanced therapies.

Revive Medical Technologies Inc. software team has successfully developed and deployed Google play store App. Publishing a Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) app in the healthcare category is no small feat and today, we’re thrilled to announce ours has successfully passed Google Play’s stringent requirements.

From medical device integration and secure patient vitals capture to clinician dashboards, AI Healthcare Agent insights, and strict compliance requirements, every phase from development to deployment comes with real technical, regulatory, and platform hurdles.

Healthcare software demands accuracy, reliability, privacy, and trust. Meeting Google Play healthcare policies while delivering a production-grade RPM solution is a challenge few truly understand until they’ve built one.

Proud of the Software Team Mr. Wajahat Mr. Amir Mr. Istafa and Mr. Umer at Revive Medical Technologies Inc. for turning complex healthcare concepts into a scalable, real-world product that clinicians and patients can trust.
This is just the beginning. Onward to advancing AI-powered remote care and enabling smarter clinical outcomes.

Revive Medical Technologies Inc. (RMT) boasts a distinguished legacy in the medical device industry, having pioneered proprietary production and testing equipment alongside specialized drug coating formulations. We take pride in establishing the first medical device industries in Pakistan and Saudi Arabia, dedicated to manufacturing high-quality, life-saving cardiovascular devices and implants. Our expertise extends beyond advanced process machinery and coatings to include extensive R&D in various materials and biomaterials used in intravascular devices and implants. At Revive Medical Technologies Inc., our scientific team is continuously focused on exploring innovative biomaterials and their biocompatible applications for a wide range of medical devices and implants.

The Tensura Outer Tube Stretching Machine is a cutting-edge solution designed for precision manufacturing of balloon catheters and vascular sheaths. Engineered to enhance material properties like tensile strength and ensure superior diameter tolerances, Tensura delivers consistent, high-quality results critical for medical device production. With advanced temperature control and customizable parameters, it excels in tubing neck-down processes, adapting seamlessly to diverse manufacturing needs. Optional add-ons enable simultaneous processing of multiple tubes, optimizing throughput for scalable, high-volume production. Elevate your catheter manufacturing with unmatched precision and reliability.

The Aquelis Hydrophilic Coating Machine is designed to apply precise, uniform hydrophilic coatings to balloon catheters, enhancing their trackability and performance during minimally invasive angioplasty procedures. It ensures smooth navigation through blood vessels by reducing friction, improving procedural safety and efficiency. The machine features automated controls for consistent coating application, meeting applicable international standards. It is designed to be used for medium to high throughput production setups.
Designed to bring unmatched precision and consistency to your processes and innovations
